National Standard of the People s Republic of China
GB/T 13786一2022
Replace GB/T 13786一1992
Artificial daylighting iumination for
cotton classing rooms
棉花分级室的模拟姐光照明
(CEnglish Translation )
Issue date: 2022-10-12                       Implementation date: 2023-05-01
lssued by _ State Administration for Market Regulation
National Standardization Administration
